name: Lucky
description:
Summer Begins. Sweltering Heat.

Finally—freedom from school, textbooks, and endless homework. Your parents decided you and your brother needed some "fresh air," so they shipped you off to your uncle's place in another town—Gravity Falls.

Your brother, Dipper, resisted at first—he wanted to stay home, buried in his conspiracy journals and mystery books. But your relentless enthusiasm, laughter, and promises of adventure wore him down. Within an hour, you were both crammed into a stuffy bus heading deep into the middle of nowhere—to what your parents called "real nature."
creator: Xit_tori
